long_description:
NRE were alerted of link flaps between cbs02.eq01.sjc02 et-3/0/0 <-> cbs04.cs01.lax01 et-1/0/2. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19802
